title: Do The Thing Choose Your Own Musical
company: a cast of two (Yes Anderson & Stellar Firma’s Tim Meredith and Simon Plotkin) and an orchestra of one (Ian Scott).
description: Simon PlotkinTim MeredithIan ScottJoni-Rae Anderson - Technician and Lighting Director

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 10, 2025 Updated: August 9, 20
reviews.excerpt: A rambling choose-your-own-musical caper that rivals national improv groups. It’s Friday night, and we’re in Iceland the supermarket. Ralph the virgin/tech guy has a budding flirtation with the store manager, who has a delightfully Icelandic surname this reviewer can neither remember, nor pronounce. There’s a frozen prawn platter on standby, just in case you’re feeling a little peckish.
